title: Yin Yang Pendants
subtitle: Version 3  •   Sterling Silver  •   Antiqued  •   20" Sterling Silver Chain  •   Hammered Texture
description: A great gift for inseparable couples and best friends!
- Two, small, handmade sterling silver pendants, 1 1/8" diameter when together, 3/4" wide each.
- Hammered for texture, black Patina applied to half, polished and hung from simple, sterling chain.
- Sterling silver cable chain 2.3mm X 3.3mm with lobster claw clasp - 20" in length.
NOTE: Due to this item being handmade, differences (from pictured) in color and texture will exist. I strive to keep them consistent, but minor variations do happen.
